summary: Iteration 26 testing complete. All 3 new 360Player-style features (Calendar, Attendance, Wall Posts) are working correctly. Backend APIs all pass (22/22 tests). Frontend UI verified with all new tabs accessible and functional. Fixed duplicate /calendar endpoint issue that was returning raw fixtures instead of merged events+fixtures.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <span> inside <option> in team selector dropdown - doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Duplicate /calendar endpoint at line 1080 was shadowing the new unified calendar endpoint at line 2905. Commented out the old endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 added 3 major new admin features: 1) Calendar Tab - monthly grid view with events+fixtures merged, event CRUD with type/team targeting. 2) Attendance Tab - team/group selector, stats cards (attendance rate, present, absent, events), per-player attendance rates, attendance marking modal. 3) Wall Posts Tab - announcements with team targeting, pinning, likes, comments. All backend APIs tested: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/events, GET /api/calendar (unified), POST/GET /api/admin/events/{id}/attendance, GET /api/admin/attendance/stats, POST/GET/DELETE /api/admin/posts, PUT /api/admin/posts/{id}/pin, POST/GET /api/posts/{id}/like, POST/GET /api/posts/{id}/comments. Sidebar shows new tabs: Ανακοινώσεις, Ημερολόγιο, Παρουσίες.

calendar_tab.details: Monthly grid view, day navigation, event creation modal with type/team selection, event type legend (Προπόνηση, Αγώνας, Συνάντηση, Άλλο), upcoming events sidebar

attendance_tab.details: Team/group selector (LEFTERIA FC - Α' Ομάδα, U12, U7, U9), stats cards (ΠΑΡΟΥΣΙΑ %, ΠΑΡΟΝΤΕΣ, ΑΠΟΝΤΕΣ, ΕΚΔΗΛΩΣΕΙΣ), per-player attendance list, events list with fixtures from database

wall_posts_tab.details: Post creation modal with content, team targeting, image URL, pinning checkbox. Empty state shows 'Δεν υπάρχουν ανακοινώσεις'

sidebar_new_tabs.details: Ανακοινώσεις, Ημερολόγιο, Παρουσίες tabs visible and clickable in admin sidebar

existing_features.details: Dashboard, Teams (ΟΜΑΔΕΣ with LEFTERIA FC - Α' ΟΜΑΔΑ showing 20 players), Academy, News, Shop tabs still working

backend_events_api.details: POST /api/admin/events creates event, GET /api/admin/events returns list, PUT/DELETE work correctly

backend_calendar_api.details: GET /api/calendar returns merged events+fixtures with source field (event/fixture), type field, title, date, location

backend_attendance_api.details: POST /api/admin/events/{id}/attendance saves records, GET returns attendance, GET /api/admin/attendance/stats returns per-player rates

backend_wall_posts_api.details: POST /api/admin/posts creates post, GET returns list, DELETE removes post, PUT /api/admin/posts/{id}/pin toggles pin, POST /api/posts/{id}/like toggles like, POST/GET /api/posts/{id}/comments work

bug_fixed.root_cause: Old /calendar endpoint at line 1080 was registered before new unified endpoint at line 2905, causing FastAPI to use the old one
bug_fixed.fix: Commented out old endpoint at line 1080
